entries.title: Disclosure toggles (Code/Bugs/Sessions/Tasks days, Epic Tree) now feel truly instant — removed residual press-feedback animation on expand/collapse
Data backfill for sessions 92–95 across both tracker rails (code-volume + task files)
Changelog page now shows full project history (68 entries from Feb 26 to present)
Backfill Decision Tree with 33 entries across 4 projects
Design polish pass — smoother animations, button press feedback, and reduced-motion support
Apply data visualization heuristics — direct labels, brush/zoom, and consistent legends across all charts
Tighten chart legends to sit closer to their parent charts
Correct project phase labels and mark Feedback Capture v1.0 milestone
Fix LOC counts to exclude auto-generated data files
Automated changelog system powered by PR descriptions
InsightsView readability pass — larger fonts and better spacing
Apply shared design tokens — Inter font and consistent styling
Replace History tab with horizontal process timeline
Narrative-driven InsightsView redesign — 5 story chapters replacing raw data tabs
Cross-project insights view — select "All Projects" for portfolio-wide analytics
Fix LOC chart y-axis overflow on projects with large line counts
Add On The Move and Note Worthy projects with live app links
Add custom favicon
Add Note Worthy to project tracker
Log bugs and add decision tree entries for mid-March sessions
Fix data gaps in charts, milestone markers, and BIP session ordering
Mark Meta Tracker v1.0 milestone
Migrate to Vite 8 and React 19 for faster builds
Add PR quality gates — lint, typecheck, and build checks on every pull request
Joint project type with contributor tracking and check-in workflow
Grouped project switcher, clickable phase badges, and attribution slider
Timeline day grouping, shared session toggle, and smarter tick density
Fix badge colors, layout shift, and driver chart rendering issues
Tracking mode toggle and phase chapter visual indicators
Migrate all tabs to Day/Block data model for consistent session grouping
Decision tree date anchoring — entries now tied to specific dates
Add Landing Page and Feedback Capture projects
Backfill decision tree data for early March across 4 projects
Playwright CI — automated end-to-end tests run on every pull request
Project milestone markers on timeline with BIP v1.0 as first entry
UX fixes — phase cards, donut charts, driver breakdowns, and research tracking
Deep Playwright end-to-end test suite covering all dashboard views
Add Vuln Bank project to tracker
Cross-project phase view, driver breakdown chart, and phase badges
Decision tree updates and hidden Easter egg
Add designer credit and backfill planning session data
Add Item-B-Gone and Vuln Bank projects to tracker
Extended data model with project metadata and session classification
Add Time Machine to History tab — browse dashboard state at any past date
Accessibility pass — screen reader labels, keyboard navigation, and ARIA attributes
Security Compass dark/light theme toggle
Add security headers for Cloudflare Pages deployment
Remove Basic Auth — dashboard is now publicly accessible
Fix category bar and parent date bar layout regressions
Fix chart grouping bugs and add per-tool trend lines
Fix weekly chart, donut layout, default project selection, and live app links
Session tool tracking and Average Task Time chart
Chart scaling improvements — milestone labels and weekly toggle
Code tab sorted newest-first for faster access to recent sessions
Stacked Tree: collapsible nodes, multi-open support, and pill-style badges
Add History tab to How We Work overlay
Metrics UX overhaul — interactive chart tooltips, session grouping, and tab persistence
Dashboard polish — donut charts, bugs table, and timeline tooltips
Stacked Tree View — new hierarchical code visualization with filtering
Group Net Change and Code tabs by date with collapsible rows
Add Remnants project to tracker
Metrics Dashboard with Overview, Sessions, Code, and Bugs tabs
Animated donut charts for bug tracking visualization
SVG area/line chart replacing static LOC bars in Overview
Grouped session bars with shared hover tooltips
Multi-project support with project selector dropdown
Decision Tree: view switcher, compact summary, collapsible filters, and chapter stats
Rename phases to chapters, add Discovery/Pivot node types and category filters
Vertical layout refactor with expandable decision branches
Node categories with Technical and Functional filtering
Launch Meta Tracker — interactive decision tree dashboard built with React Flow
